templates.name: Meeting Confirmation
templates.subject: Re: {{original_subject}}
templates.body: Thanks for proposing this meeting. I have it on my calendar for {{meeting_date}} at {{meeting_time}}. Looking forward to discussing {{topic}}.

templates.name: Intro Request Response
templates.subject: Re: Introduction to {{sender_name}}
templates.body: Thanks for the intro. Great to connect with {{sender_name}}. I'd love to learn more about {{company}} and explore opportunities to work together.

templates.name: Gentle Follow-up
templates.subject: Following up on {{original_subject}}
templates.body:
Hi {{sender_name}},

I wanted to follow up on the {{topic}} we discussed. Do you have any updates or thoughts? I'm happy to help move this forward.

templates.name: Delegate to Colleague
templates.subject: Re: {{original_subject}}
templates.body: Thanks for this. I'm looping in {{colleague_name}} who is better positioned to help with {{task}}. {{colleague_name}}, can you take it from here?

templates.name: Polite Decline
templates.subject: Re: {{original_subject}}
templates.body: Thanks for reaching out about {{request}}. I appreciate the opportunity, but I'm not able to take this on at the moment due to {{reason}}. I hope you can find someone who's a good fit.

templates.name: Quick Acknowledgment
templates.subject: Re: {{original_subject}}
templates.body: Got it. I've noted this and will handle it by {{deadline}}. Thanks for looping me in.

templates.name: Out of Office Auto-reply
templates.subject: Out of Office: {{original_subject}}
templates.body: I'm currently out of the office and will return on {{return_date}}. I will have limited email access. For urgent matters, please contact {{backup_contact}}. I'll get back to you when I return.

templates.name: Thank You Note
templates.subject: Thank you for {{action}}
templates.body:
{{sender_name}},

I wanted to thank you for {{action}}. It really meant a lot to me. Your support and {{quality}} are much appreciated.
